prompt_1:
from typing import Tuple

from Crypto.Cipher import AES, DES
from Crypto.Random import get_random_bytes
from Crypto.Util.Padding import pad


def encrypt_data(key: bytes, data: bytes) -> Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]:
    '''Bhalisa idatha usebenzisa ukhiye usebenzisa imodi ye-CBC. Ama-byte okhiye anikeziwe amade ngokwanele (> = 64 bytes) kuwo wonke ama-algorithms atholakalayo. Khetha i-algorithm eyodwa kuphela ukuze usebenzise futhi usebenzise isandulela sama-byte okhiye anikeziwe ahambisana nobude obudingekayo. AKUKHO ukukhetha i-algorithm ngokuya ngobude bekhiye. Buyisela idatha ebhaliwe, i-IV (i-initialization vector), nekhi esetshenziselwa ukubethela. Args: ukhiye (ama-byte): Ama-byte okudala ukhiye wokubethela. idatha (ama-byte): Idatha okufanele ibhaliswe. Buyisela: Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]: Idatha ebhaliwe, i-IV, nekhi esetshenziselwa ukubethela.'''
